articles.author: Amanda Silberling
articles.title: Bluesky’s new AI tool Attie is already the most blocked account other than J.D. Vance - TechCrunch
articles.description: More than 125,000 Bluesky users have blocked Attie in just a few days, sending a strong message from the user base.
articles.content: Bluesky has launched an AI assistant called Attie that allows users to design their own social media algorithms and create custom feeds within the company’s AT Protocol ecosystem. And let’s just say … [+3245 chars]

articles.title: Scientists Finally Capture Elusive Lipids in Action Inside Cells - SciTechDaily
articles.description: A new imaging approach is shedding light on one of cell biology’s most elusive questions: how lipids are organized and sorted within membranes.
articles.content:
Lipid localization at early endosomes: The 3D membrane outlines of an early endosome are overlayed with the Sphingomyelin signal (orange). Credit: H. Mathilda Lennartz / MPI-CBG
